arts.ttl: Man City vs Aston Villa live early team news plus kick-off time and how to watch
arts.sum: Manchester City and Aston Villa meet at the Etihad for a fixture that will play a huge role in deciding who qualifies for the Champions League next season.

arts.ttl: Man City 'set for October trial' vs Premier League over latest rule change challenge
arts.sum: Manchester City are reportedly set to take the Premier League to trial over Associated Party Transaction rules.

arts.ttl: Manchester City target Désiré Doué yet to begin extension talks with PSG
arts.sum: Désiré Doué’s (19) performances for Paris Saint-Germain in 2025 have caught the eyes of Manchester City, as per Sacha Tavolieri. The Cityzens’ interest in the France international has pushed PSG to begin contract extension…

arts.ttl: Man City vs. Aston Villa: Visitors looking to end 62-year streak in pivotal Premier League fixture
arts.sum: Aston Villa will be looking to end a 62-year streak when they square off against Manchester City in their Premier League fixture at the Etihad Stadium on Tuesday night.

arts.ttl: Man City get unexpected transfer boost from UEFA to cement status above Real Madrid and Liverpool
arts.sum: Manchester City accountants will be buoyed by a fresh £4m boost from UEFA for having more players than any other club in European in international competition.

arts.ttl: Grealish and Doku back, De Bruyne out - Man City predicted line-up vs Aston Villa
arts.sum: Manchester City take on Aston Villa in a must-win Premier League clash that could define their Champions League qualification chances.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa winger is looking for immediate exit from the club due to Unai Emery
arts.sum: Aston Villa have had an impressive season as Unai Emery’s team reached the quarterfinal of the Champions League. They are still fighting in the league to qualify for the Champions League next but not everything is well at the club. Some of the players, who have not seen enough playing time this season, are not […] The post Aston Villa winger is looking for immediate exit from the club due to Unai Emery appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Man City transfer news: Academy graduate to receive 'salary increase' as negotiations take place over new deal
arts.sum: Manchester City are reportedly prepared to hand one of their academy graduates a significant salary increase to conclude negotiations over a new contract.

arts.ttl: Monchi and scout spotted as they make check ahead of planned Aston Villa transfer
arts.sum: Only recently, Nypan's father Arne confirmed that his son, coveted by various clubs from around Europe, was in the process of completing a move away from boyhood club Rosenborg ahead of England's summer transfer window. Aston Villa's president of football operations Monchi was reported to have attended Rosenborg's meeting with Eliteserien opponents Valerenga on Easter Monday in order to make a further check on transfer target Sverre Nypan and speak with his father about the prospects of a move.

arts.ttl: 'Makes my job easier' - Early frontrunner emerges in race to be next Man City captain
arts.sum: Manchester City must elect a new club captain next season when current skipper Kevin De Bruyne leaves in the summer.
